V.I.P. Customization, Personalization & Segmenting
MARK COMPLETE 	← PREVIOUS TOPIC 	NEXT TOPIC →
V.I.P. CUSTOMIZATION, PERSONALIZATION & SEGMENTING
Topic Progress:
"When you take care of your customer. Your customer will take care of you."
In this lesson, I'll teach you how to make your star customers feel V.I.P. through email.
It's important to first segment and figure out who your V.I.Ps even are whether it's
based on the amount of orders they place or the revenue they generate. Then, figure out
how you can send them specific content whether in campaigns or in the flows we've
discussed in the course. This will reinforce brand loyalty and keep your darlings coming
back.
ACTION ITEMS
Think about ways you can segment your V.I.P. customers.
Write down 3-5 content ideas specifically catered to their behavior.
TOOLS & RESOURCES
Ecommerce Personalization: A Complete Guide, Sleeknote
Advanced Ecommerce Personalization Tactics that Work, Barilliance
